title: Simple Ores Resources
description: Resource packs for Simple Ores and SimpleOres add-ons
body:
Primarily alternate texture packs for Simple Ores, Fusion, and other SimpleOres add-ons.

* **SimpleOres Classic** - The original textures from the SimpleOres and Fusion mods, before they were updated to Minecraft 1.14.4+ art styles. Recently added the original textures from Netherrocks, including the original version of netherrack-based ores, as well as the original textures from Aesthetics and Machines. (Unfortunately, the old version of the Nether Furnace textures has been misplaced and will have to restored at a later date). Goes well with the original Minecraft textures, aka "Programmer Art" resource pack.  

* **Thombias's SimpleOres** - Simple Ores and Fusion textures updated to 1.14.4+ Minecraft art styles, artwork by Thombias. This is the complete pack of Thombias's textures, most of which were used in the SimpleOres and Fusion updates. Complements the current art style of vanilla Minecraft.

* **SimpleCoreLibTest** - for SimpleOres,etc. texture artists to load test textures into SimpleCoreLib and look at the test objects.
